description: CompositionLobster red polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with grey stripes and short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, vented hem, ribbed collar, short buttoned placket, mock hem, collar and sleeves, brand badge appliquéd on the left chest and sleeve, embroidered lettering on the left chest, vented hemFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wringDry inside out in shadeWarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry clean Wear this lobster red polo neck tee with grey stripes from s.oliver if you want to look classy and chilled out at the same time. Look dashing without making an effort! And the pure cotton fabric will keep you comfortable all day. Pair it with jeans or cargos for a great look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
